mapper.select: SELECT DETAIL_NM FROM mhdb.TB_CODE_DETAIL WHERE GROUP_CD = 'POSTGRESQL' AND DETAIL_CD = #{detailCd}

SELECT S.JOB_ID AS jobId, S.DEST_SERVER AS destServer, S.JOB_SCHEDULE AS jobSchedule, S.SRC_IP AS srcIp, S.SRC_PORT AS srcPort, C1.DETAIL_NM AS srcDbms, S.SRC_DBMS_CD AS srcDbmsCd, S.SRC_DB AS srcDb, S.SRC_USER AS srcUser, S.SRC_PASSWD AS srcPasswd, S.SRC_SQL AS srcSql, S.USE_YN AS useYn, S.DEST_IP AS destIp, S.DEST_PORT AS destPort, C2.DETAIL_NM AS destDbms, S.DEST_DBMS_CD AS destDbmsCd, S.DEST_DB AS destDb, S.DEST_USER AS destUser, S.DEST_PASSWD AS destPasswd, S.JOB_METHOD_CD AS jobMethodCd, S.DEST_TABLE AS destTable, S.SAVE_PREQ_CD AS savePreqCd, S.SAVE_PREQ AS savePreq, S.JOB_TYPE_CD AS jobTypeCd, S.JOB_CLASS AS jobClass, S.JOB_PATH AS jobPath, S.SELECT_YN AS jobSelected FROM SCHEDULE S, CODEDETAIL C1, CODEDETAIL C2 WHERE S.SRC_DBMS_CD = C1.DETAIL_CD AND 'DBMS_CD' = C1.GROUP_CD AND S.SRC_DBMS_CD = C2.DETAIL_CD AND 'DBMS_CD' = C2.GROUP_CD AND LOWER(S.JOB_CD) = LOWER(#{jobCd})
SELECT JOB_CD AS jobCd, JOB_NM AS jobNm, JOB_SCHEDULE AS jobSchedule FROM SCHEDULE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND JOB_SCHEDULE IS NOT NULL

SELECT C.COL_SEQ AS colSeq, C.COL_CD AS colCd, C.COL_NM AS colNm, C.COL_TYPE_CD AS colTypeCd, C.COL_LEN AS colLen, C.COL_DATE_YN AS colDateYn, C.COL_ENC_YN AS colEncYn FROM SCHEDULE_COL C INNER JOIN SCHEDULE S ON C.JOB_ID = S.JOB_ID WHERE LOWER(S.JOB_CD) = LOWER(#{jobCd}) ORDER BY C.COL_SEQ
SELECT MENU_NM FROM mhdb.TB_MENU WHERE MENU_URL ILIKE '%' || #{programId} || '%' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mhdb.TB_USER_LOGS ( GROUP_ID, USER_ID, USER_CD, PROGRAM_WHERE, USER_NAME, IP_ADDRESS, PROGRAM_ID, PROGRAM_NM, METHOD, ACTION_DATE, ACTION_TIME ) VALUES ( #{groupId}, #{userId}, #{userCd}, #{programWhere}, #{userName}, #{addr}, #{programId}, #{programNm}, #{method}, current_date, current_timestamp )
mapper.select: SELECT ENO AS eno, NAME AS name, OFT AS oft, PZCNM AS pzcnm, BRNM AS brnm FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE BRC = (SELECT BRC FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC = (SELECT MOBR_BRC FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC2 = (SELECT MOBR_BRC2 FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC3 = (SELECT MOBR_BRC3 FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND OFT_C IN ('800', '111', '113') ORDER BY OFT_C DESC

SELECT ENO AS eno, NAME AS name, OFT AS oft, PZCNM AS pzcnm, BRNM AS brnm FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE BRC = (SELECT BRC FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC = (SELECT MOBR_BRC FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC2 = (SELECT MOBR_BRC2 FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC3 = (SELECT MOBR_BRC3 FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND (PZCC = '22' OR OFT_C = '201') ORDER BY OFT_C DESC
SELECT CAST((CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '-1 day') AS TEXT)

SELECT ENO AS eno, NAME AS name, OFT AS oft, PZCNM AS pzcnm, BRNM AS brnm FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE BRC = (SELECT BRC FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC = (SELECT MOBR_BRC FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC2 = (SELECT MOBR_BRC2 FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND MOBR_BRC3 = (SELECT MOBR_BRC3 FROM mhdb.TB_INSA_MST WHERE ENO = #{userCd}) AND PZCC = '21' ORDER BY OFT_C DESC
